side_effects.description: After taking ~200mg MDMA while on Reta, took a full week to return to normal sleep routine, with weird brain zaps in the evening. Previously recovered in 1-2 days.
MDMA effects felt similar to usual, maybe slightly less, but prolonged recovery compared to pre-Reta use

protocol_notes: User stopped drinking completely even before Reta. Uses MDMA once or twice a year at up to 200mg. Noticed prolonged recovery (brain zaps, sleep disruption lasting a week) compared to previous 1-2 day recovery pre-Reta. Attributes some effects possibly to altered lifestyle (less late nights) since starting Reta.
